author: Chris McClendon
name: 11L VE128 PartialRoPE LNScale Legal TTT
blurb: 11-layer depth-recurrence GPT with Value Embeddings (128d on layers 9-10), Partial RoPE (16/64), Layer-Norm Scale, XSA last 4, BigramHash(2048), legal score-first TTT (3-epoch SGD momentum=0.9), int6+zstd quantization, SWA, and Late QAT. Key techniques integrated from PR #455 and #442. Trained on 4xA100.
